news.t: Bonds Are in Turmoil Again. How to Protect Your Portfolio.
Fisher Asset Management Trims Several ETF Positions

overview.description: The Vanguard Mortgage-Backed Securities ETF (VMBS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US MBS - Float Adjusted index. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of US mortgage-backed securities. VMBS was launched on Nov 19, 2009 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: Bonds Are in Turmoil Again. How to Protect Your Portfolio.
data.text: Consider shifting to areas of the market that are less sensitive to inflation expectations.

data.title: Fisher Asset Management Trims Several ETF Positions
data.text: Ken Fisher (Trades, Portfolio)'s Fisher Asset Management sold shares of the following stocks during the first quarter of 2021, which ended on March 31.
